restrictions: Did not run build or lint because the parent validator owns shared heavy checks
Created only the assigned flow report and evidence notes

assertions.title: Scrollable containers use content-visibility
assertions.reason: Found 15 in-scope scrollable containers that pair `[content-visibility:auto]` with `[contain-intrinsic-size:auto_*]` on overflowing containers, satisfying the rendering optimization pattern.

details: The pattern appears on 14 app surfaces plus 1 shared UI primitive.
Every cited line applies both `[content-visibility:auto]` and `[contain-intrinsic-size:auto_*]` to an `overflow-auto` or `overflow-y-auto` container.
evidence.sharedChecks: Per .factory/library/user-testing.md, build and lint validation for this milestone are centralized in the parent validator and were not rerun in this flow validation.

assertions.title: SVGs have reduced coordinate precision
assertions.reason: The targeted changed assets still contain multiple SVG path and attribute coordinates with 3+ decimal places, so the repository does not satisfy a strict `<= 2 decimal places maximum` validation.

details: Remaining 3+ decimal coordinate values were found in all 5 targeted changed assets.
Examples include path coordinates (`9.5882`, `13.7062`, `4.875`, `15.7072`) and gradient/filter coordinates (`12.5596`, `20.0004`, `10.6591`).
Non-coordinate precision such as `feColorMatrix` coefficients and the Framer Motion `restDelta` config were treated as out of scope.
evidence.sharedChecks: Per .factory/library/user-testing.md, build and lint validation for this milestone are centralized in the parent validator and were not rerun in this flow validation.

issues: Remaining 3+ decimal SVG coordinates are still present in each targeted changed asset.

frictions.description: SVG precision acceptance criteria are ambiguous: the scrutiny review passed a change that trimmed only 5+ decimal coordinates, while the validation contract and parent assignment call for <=2 decimal places / no remaining 3+ decimal coordinates in the targeted assets.
frictions.resolution: Reported VAL-RENDERING-002 as fail based on the current repository state and concrete remaining file:line evidence.

summary: Validated 2 rerender-and-rendering assertions via read-only inspection. VAL-RENDERING-001 passed because long scrollable containers consistently use `[content-visibility:auto]` with `contain-intrinsic-size`; VAL-RENDERING-002 failed because the targeted SVG assets still contain multiple 3+ decimal coordinate values.
